rationale: After a successful C_PIN GenKey, a generated PIN replaces the previous host-set value, so a subsequent StartSession using the old host-known challenge "new" is not supported for authorization.

rationale: The trajectory has a successful C_PIN GenKey before the target, which generates and stores a new PIN value; StartSession should not still succeed using the prior host-known challenge "new".

label: PASS
rationale: Because successful C_PIN GenKey replaces the stored PIN with a generated value, an Authenticate attempt using the prior host-known challenge "new" should not validate; a false result is supported.
